record.field: Initiate a credit check for a rental proposal

Initiates a credit analysis (Análise de Ficha) for a lease proposal. Transitions proposal state from sent/negotiation → credit_check_pending. Creates a new CreditCheck record with result=pending.
**Authorization**: Owner, Manager, or Agent (own proposals only). **Auth Headers**: Authorization: Bearer {jwt_token} | X-Openerp-Session-Id | X-Company-Id
**Required fields:** - insurer_name (string, max 255 chars)
**Invariant**: Only one pending check per proposal (partial unique index, ADR-027).
**Errors:** - 400: missing insurer_name or proposal not in sent/negotiation - 403: agent does not own proposal - 404: proposal not found - 409: pending check already exists - 422: sale proposal (credit check only for lease)
**Request:** ```json {"insurer_name": "Tokio Marine"} ```
**Response (201):** ```json { "status": "success", "data": { "id": 42, "proposal_id": 15, "insurer_name": "Tokio Marine", "result": "pending", "requested_at": "2026-04-29T14:30:00Z", "_links": { "self": {"href": "/api/v1/proposals/15/credit-checks/42"}, "proposal": {"href": "/api/v1/proposals/15"} } } } ```
Register the result of a pending credit check

Registers approved / rejected / cancelled on a pending CreditCheck.
- **approved**: Proposal → accepted. Competing proposals cancelled. - **rejected**: Proposal → rejected (terminal). Queue promotion triggered. - **cancelled**: Check cancelled. Proposal reverts to sent (FR-007c).
**Authorization**: Owner, Manager, or Agent (own proposals only).
**Required fields:** - result (approved | rejected | cancelled)
**Conditional fields:** - rejection_reason (required when result=rejected) - check_date (optional, must not be future)
**Errors:** - 400: missing result or rejection_reason - 404: check or proposal not found - 409: check already resolved (immutable)
**Request:** ```json { "result": "rejected", "rejection_reason": "Renda insuficiente para o valor solicitado.", "check_date": "2026-04-29" } ```
List all credit checks for a proposal

Returns all credit check records for a given proposal, ordered by requested_at desc.
**Authorization**: Owner, Manager, or Agent (own proposals only).
**Query params:** - result (filter: pending | approved | rejected | cancelled) - limit (max 100, default 100) - offset (default 0)
**Response (200):** ```json { "status": "success", "data": { "items": [...], "limit": 100, "offset": 0, "_links": {"self": {"href": "/api/v1/proposals/15/credit-checks"}} } } ```
Get full credit check history for a client

Returns the complete credit check history for a client (res.partner) across all proposals in the company.
**Authorization**: - Owner/Manager: any client in their company - Agent: only clients from their own proposals (any state). Returns 404 for out-of-scope clients (ADR-008 anti-enumeration). - Receptionist: read-only access
**Performance**: < 300ms for up to 1,000 checks per company (SC-004).
**Query params:** - limit (max 100, default 100) - offset (default 0)
**Response (200):** ```json { "status": "success", "data": { "partner_id": 7, "summary": {"total": 3, "approved": 1, "rejected": 2, "pending": 0, "cancelled": 0}, "items": [...], "limit": 100, "offset": 0, "_links": {"self": {"href": "/api/v1/clients/7/credit-history"}} } } ```
